description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a dark brown leather or leather-like material, featuring a boxy, geometric silhouette. The seat consists of two thick, rectangular cushions, while the backrest and armrests are equally padded and rise to the same height, creating a uniform, enclosed appearance. The armrests are straight and extend from the front to the back, providing a sense of symmetry and comfort. The sofa stands on four short, block-style wooden legs, which are visible and slightly tapered, giving it a sturdy yet contemporary look. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, matching the overall minimalist design. The upholstery appears smooth with a subtle sheen, and there are no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in dark brown leather with thick cushions and straight, padded armrests, supported by four short wooden legs. The design is minimalist and uniform, with smooth upholstery and no visible patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing two thick seat cushions, padded backrest, and straight armrests, all at the same height.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the short wooden leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backrest and the symmetry of the sofa's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest profile and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and a continuous, padded backrest cushion; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at seat height, extending from front to back with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style wooden legs positioned at each corner, slightly tapered and exposed, with a natural wood texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with attached padding, matching the height of the armrests and lacking decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown color with a smooth, slightly glossy leather texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
